methods.name: odoo.addons.energy_communities.models.res_users.ResUsers.create_users_on_keycloak
documentation:
Create users on Keycloak.

1. get a token
2. loop on given users
3. push them to Keycloak if:
   a. missing on Keycloak
   b. they do not have an Oauth UID already
4. brings you to update users list

methods.name: odoo.addons.energy_communities.models.res_users.ResUsers._get_kc_users
documentation:
Retrieve users from Keycloak.

```
param token

a valida auth token from Keycloak

param **params

source:4: (WARNING/2) Inline strong start-string without end-string.

extra search params for users endpoint
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.energy_communities.models.res_users.ResUsers._assign_kc_user_groups
documentation:
Assing group to users on Keycloak.

1. get a token
2. check if _KC_CLIENT_AUTH_ACCESS_GROUP_ODOO is in KC groups
3. assign or remove user group allow-odoo
